# Last Time

::: {.incremental}
+ **Two-Dimensional Arrays**
+ **Lab — Array-Backed Stack**
+ **C-Strings**
:::

::: notes
12.02 recap. 2D arrays: type name[rows][cols], nested-loop traversal (outer on rows), row-major storage. Stack lab: five-function API (push/pop/peek/isFull/isEmpty), top index sentinel (-1). C-strings: char array + null terminator, strlen/strcpy/strcmp/strcat, contrast with std::string.
:::

---

# Today's Agenda

- Closer Look — Arrays & Memory
- The Address Operator
- Pointer Variables
- Array-Pointer Relationship
- Pointer Arithmetic
- Initializing Pointers
- Comparing Pointers
- VLAs & G++

::: notes

:::

{{< include topic_1_arrays_memory.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_2_address_operator.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_3_pointer_variables.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_4_array_pointer.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_5_pointer_arithmetic.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_6_initializing_pointers.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_7_comparing_pointers.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_8_vlas_gpp.qmd >}}

---

# Key Takeaways

- Every variable has an address; `&` gets it; a pointer variable stores it; `*` follows it
- An array name decays to a pointer to its first element — `arr[i]` and `*(arr + i)` are identical
- Pointer arithmetic scales by element size — `ptr + 1` steps one element forward, not one byte
- Always initialize pointers to `nullptr` or a valid address; never dereference an uninitialized pointer

---

# Next Time

---

# Appendix

---

## Closer Look — Arrays & Memory: Good Practices

---

## Closer Look — Arrays & Memory: Common Mistakes

---

## Closer Look — Arrays & Memory: More Examples

---

## Closer Look — Arrays & Memory: Practice Problems

---

## Closer Look — Arrays & Memory: AI Search Terms

---

## Closer Look — Arrays & Memory: Questions for Reflection

---

## The Address Operator: Good Practices

---

## The Address Operator: Common Mistakes

---

## The Address Operator: More Examples

---

## The Address Operator: Practice Problems

---

## The Address Operator: AI Search Terms

---

## The Address Operator: Questions for Reflection

---

## Pointer Variables: Good Practices

---

## Pointer Variables: Common Mistakes

---

## Pointer Variables: More Examples

---

## Pointer Variables: Practice Problems

---

## Pointer Variables: AI Search Terms

---

## Pointer Variables: Questions for Reflection

---

## Array-Pointer Relationship: Good Practices

---

## Array-Pointer Relationship: Common Mistakes

---

## Array-Pointer Relationship: More Examples

---

## Array-Pointer Relationship: Practice Problems

---

## Array-Pointer Relationship: AI Search Terms

---

## Array-Pointer Relationship: Questions for Reflection

---

## Pointer Arithmetic: Good Practices

---

## Pointer Arithmetic: Common Mistakes

---

## Pointer Arithmetic: More Examples

---

## Pointer Arithmetic: Practice Problems

---

## Pointer Arithmetic: AI Search Terms

---

## Pointer Arithmetic: Questions for Reflection

---

## Initializing Pointers: Good Practices

---

## Initializing Pointers: Common Mistakes

---

## Initializing Pointers: More Examples

---

## Initializing Pointers: Practice Problems

---

## Initializing Pointers: AI Search Terms

---

## Initializing Pointers: Questions for Reflection

---

---

---

## Comparing Pointers: More Examples

---

## Comparing Pointers: Practice Problems

---

## Comparing Pointers: AI Search Terms

---

## Comparing Pointers: Questions for Reflection

---

## VLAs & G++: Good Practices

---

## VLAs & G++: Common Mistakes

---

## VLAs & G++: More Examples

---

## VLAs & G++: Practice Problems

---

## VLAs & G++: AI Search Terms

---

## VLAs & G++: Questions for Reflection
